data.title: Equinor ASA: Buy-back of shares to share programmes for employees
data.description: Below is a summary of the recent transactions conducted as part of the buy-back program for Equinor ASA (OSE:EQNR, NYSE:EQNR). These transactions were aimed at acquiring shares to be utilized in the company's share-based incentive schemes for its employees and management.

data.title: The "Post and Pray" Era is Dead: The 3-Step AI Workflow for Lean Brands to Dominate TikTok in 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, experts emphasize that modern e-commerce operators must avoid relying on manual content creation or generic AI prompts to prevent burnout and achieve a higher Return on Advertising Spend (ROAS). The most successful TikTok strategy for 2026 involves utilizing a closed-loop data architecture for optimal results.

data.title: Carnival Corporation and Global Maritime Partners Complete Simulator Tests Shaping the Future of Navigation
data.description: A recent event conducted bridge-simulator tests that involved collaboration among ports, hydrographic offices, pilots, and mariners to determine the utilization of the advanced IHO S-100 navigation data in the upcoming phase of navigation. The video showcasing the IHO S-100 Test Bed and Sea Trial in Confined Waters is now available for viewing. This initiative aimed to pave the way for the implementation of the next-generation IHO S-100 navigation data.

data.title: Mitate Zepto Technica Joins JST's Next-generation Edge AI Semiconductor R&D Program as Social Implementation Partner
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Mitate Zepto Technica, Inc. (MZT), headquartered in Tokyo's Shibuya district, revealed its plan to drive product commercialization using its Genome-analysis Accelerator "RASEN." This announcement came as MZT joined a national research initiative. This strategic move underscores MZT's commitment to advancing genomic analysis and expediting the process of bringing products to market. The company's involvement in the initiative demonstrates its proactive approach in the field.

data.title: Pricer and JRTech Solutions signs 51 MUSD digital store transformation deal with Sobeys in Canada
data.description: Pricer AB, a prominent provider of digital shelf-edge solutions, confirmed that its Canadian collaborator JRTech Solutions has secured a significant deal with Sobeys, a top supermarket chain in Canada. The agreement entails the implementation of Pricer's technologies, marking a notable development in the retail sector. This partnership signifies a major milestone for the companies involved, underscoring their commitment to enhancing the customer experience through innovative solutions.

data.title: QAD | Redzone to Showcase AI-Powered Connected Workforce Platform at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: In Hannover, Germany, QAD | Redzone, a manufacturing and supply chain solutions company, will be showcasing its Redzone frontline empowerment layer at Hannover Messe 2026 from April 20-24. The AI-embedded Connected Workforce platform, running on AWS to support all operations, will be the focus of the demonstration. The platform's key feature, ChampionAI, utilizes production data to provide real-time recommendations. This event presents an opportunity for industry professionals to explore innovative solutions at a renowned trade fair.

data.title: QAD | Redzone Brings the Future of Agentic AI in Manufacturing to Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: A technology company, QAD | Redzone, known for innovative manufacturing and supply chain solutions, will present its AI-driven manufacturing platform at Hannover Messe 2026 in Hannover, Germany from April 20-24. The platform enables all levels of the workforce to operate more effectively. The showcase will highlight the transformation of manufacturing as AI shifts conventional record systems into proactive operational tools.
The German engineering industry association VDMA maintains its 2026 outlook of 1% real production growth, noting that sector recovery hinges on conditions in the Gulf region.

data.description: A new factory intelligence system is being developed by Accenture and Avanade in partnership with Microsoft in HANNOVER, Germany. The system aims to assist companies in revolutionizing their factory operations.

data.title: Shoplazza Launches the World's First AI-Native Commerce Operating System with a Unified Suite of AI Agents
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 20, 2026, in Toronto, Shoplazza, a prominent global commerce platform, introduced the world's pioneer AI native commerce operating system. This launch included a comprehensive set of AI agents intended to operate throughout the complete ecommerce lifecycle. This groundbreaking advancement signifies a remarkable achievement in the field of commerce technology.
